description: Language-neutral UI text strings for the picker. Edit these to change the search prompt, status bar, and help screen without touching code. {count} is substituted with the live match count. Keep lines within the rendered content width (spec/layout.json) or they are truncated. Consumed by both the Zig app and the Go mojigo port. help_lines is the narrow/default help (mojigo + Zig narrow terminals); help_lines_wide is shown by the Zig app on wide terminals (>=35 cols).
